scripts.preview: node scripts/open-next.mjs build && node scripts/open-next.mjs preview
scripts.deploy: node scripts/open-next.mjs build && node scripts/open-next.mjs deploy
scripts.deploy:staging: node scripts/open-next.mjs build && node scripts/open-next.mjs deploy --env staging
scripts.upload: node scripts/open-next.mjs build && node scripts/open-next.mjs upload
scripts.upload:staging: node scripts/open-next.mjs build && node scripts/open-next.mjs upload --env staging
